module.exports = ({ jscodeshift, utils, root, packageName = '@tanstack/react-query', }) => { const filterUseQueryLikeHookCalls = (node, importIdentifiers, hooks) => { for (const hook of hooks) { const selector = utils.getSelectorByImports(importIdentifiers, hook) if (utils.isFunctionCallOf(node, selector)) { return true } } return false } const findUseQueryLikeHookCalls = (importIdentifiers, hooks) => root // First, we need to find all call expressions. .find(jscodeshift.CallExpression, {}) // Then we narrow the collection to the `useQuery` like hook calls. .filter((node) => filterUseQueryLikeHookCalls(node.value, importIdentifiers, hooks), ) const execute = (hooks, replacer) => { findUseQueryLikeHookCalls( utils.locateImports(hooks, packageName), hooks, ).replaceWith(replacer) } return { execute, } }
